raw_consumer_statement:
XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX dated XX/XX/XXXX charged the amount of {$1100.00} on my American Express Credit card. This charge is fraud, made by the merchant without prior notification nor permission from myself nor the other card holder. 

We entered into a XXXX lease agreement with XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, XXXX from XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX. We returned the rental vehicles in XX/XX/XXXX and closed out the balance due before moving back to the United Stated. In XX/XX/XXXX, the charge of {$1100.00} was made without prior notification nor permission by XXXX XXXX, XXXX. This was XXXX ( XXXX ) months after the end of my lease agreement with XXXX, thus they no longer had Charge Authorization to process a payment on my card.

I submitted two separate charge disputes with American Express for this charge both of which they upheld the merchants ' claim. 

XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX charged American Express card without prior billing or notification. 
XX/XX/XXXX - Submitted dispute with American Express XX/XX/XXXX XXXX American Express denied the reverse charge request XX/XX/XXXX - Resubmitted the charge dispute with American Express XX/XX/XXXX XXXX American Express denied the reverse charge request
